message:
Command `find /nix/store -name "ciel" -path "*/bin/*" 2>/dev/null | head -3
NIX_PYTHONPREFIX=/nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env \
    NIX_PYTHONEXECUTABLE=/nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/bin/python3.11 \
    NIX_PYTHONPATH=/nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages \
    PYTHONNOUSERSITE=true \
    /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/bin/python3.11 -c "
import ciel
home = ciel.get_ciel_home('/nc/pdk')
print('CIEL home:', home)
fams = list(ciel.Family.by_name.keys())
print('Families:', fams[:5])
" 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
